name: 100% Parmesan Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup (2 ounces) Kraft 100% grated Parmesan cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Spray a 15X10X1-inch baking pan with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Dip each chicken breast in the melted margarine, coating it evenly.
4. Sprinkle the remaining ingredients over the chicken breasts, ensuring they are well coated.
5. Place the chicken breasts in the prepared baking pan.
6. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and tender.
7. Serve and enjoy your delicious Parmesan Chicken!
Makes 6 servings.
